title: Weekly Open Incident Summary
problem: Support leadership wants a weekly email containing filtered open incidents.
approach: Use a saved search, template, and automation schedule to generate and send the summary.
outcome: A repeatable leadership update is delivered without manual effort.

title: Customer Response Reactivation
problem: Tickets waiting on a customer remain idle after the customer replies.
approach: Detect the reply, move the state, and notify the owning team automatically.
steps: Notify the owner and test repeat replies

title: Multi-step Request Approval
problem: A request type needs different approval branches depending on its category and risk.
approach: Use workflow branching, approval stages, and fallback handling to control the path.
steps: Test reject, approve, and timeout outcomes
outcome: Request fulfillment is governed and auditable.

title: External Approval Sync
problem: An external platform must approve an item while Ivanti remains synchronized.
approach: Use secure APIs, mapping, and retries to keep approval state aligned across systems.
outcome: Approval state remains consistent across both platforms.

title: Scheduled Data Push
problem: Operational data needs to be pushed on schedule to another system.
approach: Use a scheduled integration with transformation, validation, and monitoring.
outcome: Data delivery becomes repeatable and observable.

title: Non-compliant Device Response
problem: A managed device violates policy and must be remediated or restricted.
approach: Apply compliance rules with remediation, notification, and reporting.
outcome: Policy violations are handled consistently and quickly.

title: Managed App Rollout
problem: A business-critical mobile app must be rolled out to a managed population.
approach: Use targeting, ownership awareness, policy alignment, and validation.
outcome: App delivery is controlled and supportable.

title: BYOD Enrollment Setup
problem: Personal devices need a BYOD flow with the right balance of privacy and control.
approach: Design ownership-aware enrollment, baseline policies, and support guidance.
outcome: BYOD management is consistent and easier to explain.

title: Phased Patch Deployment
problem: A broad patch rollout must avoid unnecessary business risk.
approach: Use pilot rings, phased rollout, and exception tracking.
outcome: Patching becomes safer and easier to troubleshoot.

title: Targeted Software Distribution
problem: A package must reach only the intended device population with clear reporting.
approach: Use groups, scheduling, and validation to control the rollout.
outcome: Software reaches the right devices with measurable status.

title: Asset Refresh Planning
problem: Older assets need identification and refresh planning using trustworthy data.
approach: Combine lifecycle, repository, and reporting views to flag refresh candidates.

title: Discovery Reconciliation Improvement
problem: Inventory data from multiple sources does not align cleanly.
approach: Normalize fields, align identifiers, and reconcile duplicates.
outcome: Asset and inventory data become more trustworthy.

title: Warehouse Picking Flow Redesign
problem: A picking process is too slow and requires too many interactions.
approach: Simplify screens and prompts for scan-first execution.
outcome: Operators complete work faster with less friction.

title: Field Workflow Simplification
problem: A desktop-originated browser flow is awkward on handheld devices.
approach: Adapt the flow for small screens and focused field execution.
outcome: Field work is easier to complete accurately.
